---
title: "MB Habituation - Preprocessing"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

## Load and filter

Keep only habituation trials with valid looking times.

```{r load}
final_merged_manybabies <- read_csv(here("data","raw_data","final_merged_manybabies.csv"))

d <- final_merged_manybabies |>
  filter(habituation == TRUE) |>
  filter(!is.na(looking_time), looking_time > 0) |>
  mutate(
    trial_num = as.numeric(trial_number),
    log_lt    = log(looking_time),
    subject   = factor(unique_subject_identifier),
    project   = factor(project_id),
    lab       = factor(lab_id)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(trial_num))

d |> count(project_id, name = "n_trials")
```

## Save

```{r}
write_csv(d, here("data","processed_data","final_merged_manybabies_preprocessed.csv"))
```
